Package calendar.model

Class CalendarEvent.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.model.CalendarEvent.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    CalendarEvent
    public static class CalendarEvent.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder class for constructing CalendarEvent instances. Ensures validation and provides a fluent API for setting optional fields.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Builder​(java.lang.String subject, java.time.LocalDateTime start, java.time.LocalDateTime end)
      Constructor with required fields.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      CalendarEvent build()
      Builds the CalendarEvent instance.
      CalendarEvent.Builder description​(java.lang.String description)
      Sets the event description.
      CalendarEvent.Builder end​(java.time.LocalDateTime newEnd)
      Updates the end time.
      CalendarEvent.Builder location​(java.lang.String location)
      Sets the event location.
      CalendarEvent.Builder recurrenceDays​(Weekday[] days)
      Sets recurrence days without validation (for copying).
      CalendarEvent.Builder repeatCount​(java.lang.Integer count)
      Sets the repeat count for recurring events.
      CalendarEvent.Builder repeatUntil​(java.time.LocalDateTime until)
      Sets the end date for recurring events.
      CalendarEvent.Builder seriesId​(java.lang.String seriesId)
      Sets the series ID for recurring events.
      CalendarEvent.Builder start​(java.time.LocalDateTime newStart)
      Updates the start time.
      CalendarEvent.Builder status​(EventStatus status)
      Sets the event status.
      CalendarEvent.Builder withRecurrence​(Weekday[] recurrenceDays)
      Configures the event as recurring with specified days.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Builder

        public Builder​(java.lang.String subject,
               java.time.LocalDateTime start,
               java.time.LocalDateTime end)
        Constructor with required fields.
        Parameters:
        subject - the event subject (required, non-empty)
        start - the start date-time (required)
        end - the end date-time (required, must be after start)
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails

    • Method Detail

      • description

        public CalendarEvent.Builder description​(java.lang.String description)
        Sets the event description.
        Parameters:
        description - the event description
        Returns:
        this builder

      • location

        public CalendarEvent.Builder location​(java.lang.String location)
        Sets the event location.
        Parameters:
        location - the event location
        Returns:
        this builder

      • status

        public CalendarEvent.Builder status​(EventStatus status)
        Sets the event status.
        Parameters:
        status - the event status
        Returns:
        this builder
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if status is null

      • start

        public CalendarEvent.Builder start​(java.time.LocalDateTime newStart)
        Updates the start time.
        Parameters:
        newStart - the new start time
        Returns:
        this builder
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails

      • end

        public CalendarEvent.Builder end​(java.time.LocalDateTime newEnd)
        Updates the end time.
        Parameters:
        newEnd - the new end time
        Returns:
        this builder
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails

      • withRecurrence

        public CalendarEvent.Builder withRecurrence​(Weekday[] recurrenceDays)
        Configures the event as recurring with specified days.
        Parameters:
        recurrenceDays - days of the week to repeat on
        Returns:
        this builder
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if recurrenceDays is null or empty

      • seriesId

        public CalendarEvent.Builder seriesId​(java.lang.String seriesId)
        Sets the series ID for recurring events.

      • recurrenceDays

        public CalendarEvent.Builder recurrenceDays​(Weekday[] days)
        Sets recurrence days without validation (for copying).

      • repeatCount

        public CalendarEvent.Builder repeatCount​(java.lang.Integer count)
        Sets the repeat count for recurring events.
        Parameters:
        count - the number of occurrences
        Returns:
        this builder
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if count is not positive

      • repeatUntil

        public CalendarEvent.Builder repeatUntil​(java.time.LocalDateTime until)
        Sets the end date for recurring events.
        Parameters:
        until - the end date for the series
        Returns:
        this builder

      • build

        public CalendarEvent build()
        Builds the CalendarEvent instance.
        Returns:
        a new immutable CalendarEvent
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails
